metadata.title: The best books, fast delivery and great prices!

features.heading: Buying books has never been this easy
features.subheading: Thousands of books, fast delivery, secure payment — all in one place.

catalog.title: Large catalog
catalog.description: Thousands of books from Uzbek, Russian and international publishers. Filter by genre, author or topic.

delivery.title: Fast delivery
delivery.description: Place your order — we'll deliver it to your door. Available across all regions.

search.title: Smart search
search.description: Title, author or ISBN — type in any language and the system will find it.

payment.title: Secure payment
payment.description: Click, Payme, bank card — choose what works for you. All payments are encrypted and protected.

recommendations.title: Personal recommendations
recommendations.description: We suggest new books based on your reading history and favorite genres.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.description: Have a question? Our team is always ready — via chat, phone or Telegram.
